LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT MEENA RAMBARAN DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT: THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING (DEMURRER TO 3RD CAUSE OF ACTION CONSTRUCTIVE FRAUD AND DEMURRER TO 4TH CAUSE OF ACTION MONEY HAD AND RECEIVED SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. NO OPPOSITION. 5TH CAUSE OF ACTION CONVERSION SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. DEMURRER TO 6TH CAUSE OF ACTION UNJUST ENRICHMENT SUSTAIN WITH LEAVE TO AMEND OTHERWISE DEMURRER OVERRULED). ("DEMURRER OVERRULED" REFERS TO 1ST CAUSE OF ACTION FOR RESCISSION AND 2ND CAUSE OF ACTION FOR FRAUD). 15 DAYS TO AMEND. PLTF TO PREPARE ORDER. (302/AJR/AA) COURT REPORTER PATRICIA M. EVEZICH, CSR #1193

APPEAR: Douglas W. Le, Esq. 933-6030 for pltfs & opposing parties; Stephen C. Ferlmann, Esq. 209/521-1800 for deft & moving party (appearing via CourtCall); (both submitting).
RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling (DEMURRER TO 3RD CAUSE OF ACTION CONSTRUCTIVE FRAUD AND DEMURRER TO 4TH CAUSE OF ACTION MONEY HAD AND RECEIVED SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. NO OPPOSITION. 5TH CAUSE OF ACTION CONVERSION SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. DEMURRER TO 6TH CAUSE OF ACTION UNJUST ENRICHMENT SUSTAIN WITH LEAVE TO AMEND OTHERWISE DEMURRER OVERRULED). ("Demurrer overruled" refers to 1st cause of action for rescission and 2nd cause of action for fraud). 15 days to amend. Pltf to prepare order. (302/AJR/AA) Court Reporter Patricia M. Evezich, CSR #1193
